entry.title: Did You Give My Dog Chicken?!
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,929Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Richard Grayson pioneered the whole "defying the Big B" thing — first as Nightwing, then as Detective Grayson of the GCPD. Then the Red Hood fell on his head (literally), and now they're stuck playing some damn cat-and-mouse game.

entry.title: The Cowl Stays On
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,106Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Jason goes down on his knees with nothing more than a firm hand to his shoulder. The cowl shows Dick the way his heart rate spikes from that alone. Around them, Gotham churns in the ever-swelling current of the night. Police sirens in the distance. Stray dogs barking. Rats scuffling through the putrid alley refuse. For the moment, though, they ignore the thrum of urban life. "Take it off, Jaybird," Dick says, voice low and course. The way his would sound. The nickname, of course, is all Dick. Old habits. Slowly, Jason reaches up and pulls off the red helmet, setting it on the ground at his knees. Red domino underneath. He knew it would be there, but is still disappointed. There are a myriad of reasons why it has to stay on, but Dick would love to see those pretty blue-green eyes blinking up at him from his knees._____DickJay Week 2026 day 6 Batman Dick/Knightfight | Fake/Accidental Marriage | Public Sex | "So I'm your dirty little secret?"

entry.title: Hush Little One, You Are Safe Now
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,770Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 1,353

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.

entry.title: Gimme All You Got (I Can Take It)
entry.summary:
Author: Starless_Void

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,593Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Jason returns to Gotham a year after his showdown with Bruce and the Joker. He hopes to lie under the radar for a bit while he builds up a cleaner reputation for the Red Hood in the Narrows. Dick lost Jason once to the Joker, then a second time to Bruce's morals. When he gets word that Jason has returned to Gotham while Batman and Robin are on a deep space mission, Dick seizes the opportunity to reconnect with his protege, hoping to fix their bond and in the process, fix himself. Losing Bludhaven was a hard blow, and learning that Jason had been so close only to be lost to them again broke something in Dick that he hasn't been able to fix. Can Jason handle finally having someone who will always choose him first, or will he suffocate under Dick's possessive tendencies and need for constant control? Can Dick break through Jason's walls and bring his little wing back into the fold, or will he push too hard and force Jason away for good?

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,617Chapters: 3/16Kudos: 178

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: fractals
entry.summary:
Author: moonside

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,690Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: Jason starts to talk, loosens up, and just like that, they fall into the cycle again, something impossible and visceral and the most real thing Dick’s ever experienced in his whole life - because it’s as honest as it is fleeting, and he can’t escape. Tonight is… strange. A liminal space, in the fragmented crossings of their separate lives. Maybe this time will be different.--- Jason ghosts. Dick pretends he doesn't care. The cycle repeats.

entry.title: Come and get your love
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,997Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 49

Summary: "Ow, come on, Jay!" Dick whined in retaliation, "How many times did I help you out of bad situations in the past? Won't you help your poor boyfriend?" Jason snickered."Right, what do I get from this?" Dick squinted at the younger man, who did the same back."Awesome Spider-Man upside-down kiss?" Jason gave another deadpan look at his boyfriend, before shaking his head and then starting to walk towards… Oh no- "No- Jason! Jason, please!"Or: five times Dick tries to get a Spider-Man kiss and one time he actually gets it+smut in chapter two, if you're nasty.

entry.title: Victoria’s Secret Society of America
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,237Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 199

Summary: Dick, mid-kick, froze. His foot hung in the air. A flash of vibrant scarlet, impossibly delicate, peeked from beneath the waistband of Jason’s jeans. Not the tactical red of his gear, but something… lace. A tiny, ruffled edge of it, peeking out from beneath the rugged denim. A thong. Frilly. Red. The image seared itself into Dick’s brain. His breath hitched. A jolt, hot and sudden, arced through him, stunning him senseless. His balance evaporated. His elevated leg, forgotten, wobbled. He tripped over his own feet—a gasp escaping his lips—and face-planted hard into the grime-slicked asphalt.DickJay Week 2026 - Day 8 - Free Day

entry.title: blooming days
entry.summary:
Author: eutyxhia (tiramisstsu)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,934Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 131

Summary: As Jason watches Nightwing leave, Jason feels something tickle his lungs, giving him a much-unwanted coughing fit. He reaches out for the newest addition to his kit, a small thermos, and downs it in hopes of dislodging whatever has caused the sensation in the first place. Grimacing, Jason begrudgingly digs it out, catching the hint of bright purple before crushing it in palm. There’s no need for anyone to know.   Day 7 of DickJay Week 2026: Hanahaki Disease

entry.title: And your heart, love, has such darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,296Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 102

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 8) Free Day | Arkham KnightJason has been imprisoned under Arkham Asylum for over a year. When he finally gets out, he sets out on the path to revenge, but things quickly spiral out of control, and he ends up without memories in the apartment of a very handsome man who says he is his brother and calls him his Little Wing. Dick Grayson treats him with such love and care that he almost doesn't notice that he is not allowed to go outside. Dick says it's dangerous, and even if he doubted him, it's not like he actually wants to go out or anything.Two weeks pass by like this before Jason gets a nightmare. He remembers Batman, Robin, and the Joker. He remembers Nightwing and how upset Dick was at Jason's own existence. He is terrified that once Dick realizes that he remembers, he will want nothing more to do with him.
